subject: FW: Bougainvillea Photos
body:
Please let me know what you like from the below pictures.

 

Thanks

 

From: PlantDynamics@aol.com [mailto:PlantDynamics@aol.com] 
Sent: Monday, January 07, 2008 1:56 PM
To: Emad Hanna
Subject: Bouganvilla Photos

 

Good afternoon!

 

Here are the photos of the Bougainvillea you requested. A few of them
are a little blurry, however you can still see the size, caliper, and
colorings. Due to the windy weather last week, most of the Reds have
lost their color. To achieve a solid 8'OA size you will need to purchase
the #95.

 

Pricing on the various size containers are:    #15 STD    $150-175 (it
depends on my source) (5'OA)

                                                                 #25 STD
$275-325 (6-7'OA)

                                                                 #45 STD
$500 (6'OA)

                                                                 #95 STD
$1000 (8-10'OA)

 

Please note with the larger pot sizes, the caliper of the tree and
spread of the head is of significant difference.

 

 

Please let me know if there are any other photos or questions you may
have.

 

Thank You,

 

Shawna Price

561-662-1114



#15 gal Std

 

 



#25 STD

 



#45 Multi & STD

 



#45 Multi & Std Trunk (various colors)

 



#95 STD

 



#95 Std

 



#25 'Johnny Walker' Std (Orange)

 



#25 'Ms. Alice' Std

 



large Trellis Multi Colored

 



#45 'Elizabeth Angus' (Bright Purple)

 

 





________________________________

Start the year off right. Easy ways to stay in shape
<http://body.aol.com/fitness/winter-exercise?NCID=aolcmp00300000002489>
in the new year.
body_html:
Please let me know what you like from the below pictures.

 

Thanks

 

From: PlantDynamics@aol.com [mailto:PlantDynamics@aol.com]
Sent: Monday, January 07, 2008 1:56 PM
To: Emad Hanna
Subject: Bouganvilla Photos

 

Good afternoon!

 

Here are the photos of the Bougainvillea you requested. A few of them are a little blurry, however you can still see the size, caliper, and colorings. Due to the windy weather last week, most of the Reds have lost their color. To achieve a solid 8'OA size you will need to purchase the #95.

 

Pricing on the various size containers are:    #15 STD    $150-175 (it depends on my source) (5'OA)

                                                                 #25 STD    $275-325 (6-7'OA)

                                                                 #45 STD    $500 (6'OA)

                                                                 #95 STD    $1000 (8-10'OA)

 

Please note with the larger pot sizes, the caliper of the tree and spread of the head is of significant difference.

 

 

Please let me know if there are any other photos or questions you may have.

 

Thank You,

 

Shawna Price

561-662-1114
